title: Spare No Items
description: Expands the functionality of single-use vanilla items with fresh new features!
body:
⚠️ IMPORTANT: USAGE GUIDELINES  
If you're planning to use this on a server or modpack,  
please refer to:  
https://gamedash43.github.io/dash-mcl-licenses/#usage


![Title Text saying "Spare No Items"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66acd5050b931e4f516da9ddfaff3d4ef00eb66d.png)

Expands the functionality of single-use vanilla items with fresh new features.

This addon enhances items that previously had only one use, giving them new purposes while maintaining the vanilla gameplay feel.

# Features
- Adds additional uses to single-use vanilla items  
- Preserves balance and compatibility with the base game  
- Integrates with existing mechanics  

### Functional Blocks

<details>
<summary>Diffuser</summary>

A utility block that can create lingering potion clouds on demand.  
Before charging it, you must right-click it with any potion, including modded potions.  
Afterwards, the blaze rod on top should start glowing.

You can then charge it with Dragon’s Breath items, storing up to 4 charges.  
When right-clicked or when the bottom is powered with redstone, a small cloud of the placed potion forms above it for 5 minutes, with a 1/3 chance for a Dragon’s Breath to be consumed.

Place a hopper facing into the top to automatically feed Dragon’s Breath into it.

![Diffuser Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc366ae2791eab20e49ba0ebad397caa7d10bd81_0.webp)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Shell Nest</summary>

A block that can store 1 small mob for transport and safe keeping.  
To store a mob, move it onto the top of the block and right-click the block.

Tamed mobs can only be stored by their owner.  
You can mine the Shell Nest to pick it up and transport the stored mob.  
Place it back down and right-click to release the stored mob.

![Shell Nest Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7933794bd098de051d5c983bf680c598a4d77137.png)

Supported mobs:
- Shulker
- Bat
- Bee
- Cat
- Chicken
- Cow
- Fox
- Frog
- Mooshroom
- Ocelot
- Panda
- Parrot
- Pig
- Rabbit
- Sheep
- Strider
- Phantom
- Turtle
- Wolf
- Armadillo
- Allay
- Squid
- Glow Squid
- Dolphin
- Goat
- Nautilus
- Zombie Nautilus
- Silverfish
- Endermite
- Guardian


</details>
<details>
<summary>Beamstone</summary>

A special block designed for long-distance item transportation.  
Place it facing the direction you want items to travel, then right-click the top with any beacon payment item until a beam activates.  

Once the beam connects with another block, the Beamstone becomes linked to that location.  
Any item entity thrown onto the back of the Beamstone will be instantly teleported to the beam’s endpoint.  

![Beamstone Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afc194c5eca9f70badddf047a5443c430cbf3a62_0.webp)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Glow Torch</summary>

A torch that can be placed underwater as well as on land.  
When an entity stands inside it, it briefly gains the glowing effect.

![Glow Torch Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fec626cb529df990753c42acc00a37614c973d9_0.webp)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Warding Anchor</summary>

A beacon-like defensive structure that protects an area around it from common explosion griefing.  
Within its radius, it protects against TNT, creepers, ghast fireballs, end crystals, and respawn anchor or bed explosions in the wrong dimension.

![Recipe for Warding Anchor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ff52614b46a458e4db62abead79220b99f0e304.png)

There are 4 tiers, like a beacon. Tier 1 is with no gold blocks; see rest below. 
Radius by tier:
- Tier 1: 8 block radius  
- Tier 2: 16 block radius  

![Warding Anchor Multiblock Tier 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53259c9f78441d011b90ceca1687726e12381bb7.png)

- Tier 3: 24 block radius 

![Warding Anchor Multiblock Tier 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d145608d212f1e9c7714222a8b8823fc3f481e9b.png)

- Tier 4: 32 block radius  

![Warding Anchor Multiblock Tier 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72630302ba6abeec7e08209b7f591b302abf03eb.png)

Note: respawn anchor and bed explosions are not fully foolproof.  
If you intentionally try and break blocks with repeated attempts, you can still break things, but under normal gameplay it is effectively impossible.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Rough Mat</summary>

A block that stops motion on first contact.  
When a player or mob steps onto it for the first time, all motion is removed, but after initial contact they can move normally while on it.  
Additionally, while a player or mob is standing on the Rough Mat they take no knockback.

![Normal Rough Mat Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd84f7ad9cdf9d020a4b00b8bcb3bb1b037b6281.png)

![Rotten Rough Mat Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29c1382010fd12654fc5398ca105be559c8a9275.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Phantom Item Frame</summary>

When an item is placed inside, the frame turns invisible.

![Recipe for the Phantom Item Frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e0d67d921a4e77d200edbe835301cd8b458ff42.png)

</details>



### Food

<details>
<summary>Fermented Phantom Membrane</summary>

When eaten while you have active potion effects (excluding beacon effects), it makes all potion particles completely invisible.  
The item is consumed on use.

![Recipe for Fermented Phantom Membrane](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd17f8d4ba24079fb4cc0979af9e1e92cd1974c8_0.webp)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Crunchy Ice Salad</summary>

Feed this to an adult happy ghast to double its speed for 5 minutes.

![Crunchy Ice Salad Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1927f5630378fe191a8e5e13357aeca253e24b42.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Sticky Stew</summary>

When fed to a baby mob, it keeps the mob as a baby permanently.

![Recipe for Sticky Stew](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc2230951a106b876a5742192618a2cbdbe928b9.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Shattered Nether Star</summary>

When used, it is consumed and grants the player all beacon effects at maximum level for 16 seconds.  
It also restores the player's health and saturation to full.  
The item has no cooldown between uses.

![Shattered Nether Star Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c491f963469bb1d9235d69c386ae34974c310ec2.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Glistering Salad</summary>

An instant-eat item that restores a portion of the player's health.  
It has a one second cooldown between uses.

![Glistering Salad Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc63785107607d00d454a607fa6f60e34c9f4b9c.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Dried Rotten Flesh</summary>

Crafts into leather, requiring four pieces. (Rabbit hide)  
Can be eaten for 3 hunger with no saturation, takes 2x as long to eat as typical foods, and does not cause the Hunger effect.

![Dried Rotten Flesh Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2040688d9359534c9db3c288c43c010a396b8960.png)

![Dried Rotten Flesh to Leather](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb18610f2a68930ace73ca3d1ab72a23b48ec0f4.png)

</details>



### Utility Items

<details>
<summary>Breath Charge</summary>

Right-click this onto a block to spawn a small cloud of Dragon’s Breath.  
You cannot use it to collect Dragon’s Breath from the cloud.

When used in a dispenser, it becomes a powerful projectile that selects a target within 32 blocks and has extremely accurate targeting towards it.  
Be careful, as this could include the player that placed it.

![Breath Charge Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b5ad6583a1000c4e58b7fc71e48d0aa488ba47d_0.webp)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Radiance Upgrade</summary>

Add this onto any equipment made of a material that can be a beacon base block, such as gold, netherite, and more.  
You can obtain the Smithing Template occasionally when killing Withers, as long as the Wither’s death was caused by a player.  
When equipped or held, it applies a beacon effect to that related item at the lowest level, constantly, apart from regeneration.

Helmet: regeneration  
Chestplate: resistance  
Leggings: speed  
Boots: jump boost  
Weapons: strength  
Tools: haste  

![Dupe Recipe for Radiance Upgrade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c43a6392561d5f1416213b75dd6567840bd8451_0.webp)

![To Use Radiance Upgrade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3928b2dbba14c854b9e12532051e6f5d51e07ee2.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Sea Compost</summary>

A permanent bonemeal-like item for farming.  
Place it on tilled farmland, and crops planted on it get regular boosts to growth for all vanilla crops.

If the crop is already fully grown and it tries to boost it, there is a 10% chance for it to drop the crop’s item without breaking the crop.  
Be careful, as it washes away when in rain, so use greenhouse-like structures.

There are two recipe variants, and the one with tropical fish increases yield significantly.  
Both function identically.


![Recipe Sea Compost Special](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad140888135b376727e32ebe2f8164df5daf04af_0.webp)

![Use any Fish Sea Compost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fe0bc448ea94a99a5238f0cfee72b37c5e4cfa4_0.webp)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Undying Upgrade</summary>

Add this to any equipment to make it invulnerable while it is on the ground.  
You can find the Smithing Template rarely when brushing suspicious sand or gravel in cold ocean ruins.  
The item becomes immune to all damage, including lava, cactus, the void, and more, and it no longer despawns.

A cloud of bubbles forms around the item when it is on the ground.

![Undying Upgrade Dupe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d15c49fde24cf64ef0c6d37928705a1190561bc_0.webp)

![Use Undying Upgrade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4470c0f0db2b52ce4e2bc233ce721d1ec93d92f7.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Resin Coated Shell / Petrified Shell</summary>

Craft the Resin Coated Shell and place it on a clay block.  
After about 3 to 4 in-game days, it will transform into a piece of suspicious sand containing a Petrified Shell.

The Resin Coated Shell can also be placed directly underwater on sand or gravel to create a suspicious sand or gravel block.

Use the Petrified Shell on an item to make that item not despawn, invulnerable, and unable to be picked up by players.

![Resin Coated Shell Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75958fabd03e75fdabfdf002ae40c8545e08a831.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Soul Echo Upgrade</summary>

Find the Smithing Template in Ancient City chests.  
Use it at a smithing table with almost any equipment to apply the "Echoed" upgrade.  
By default, this upgrade is a one-time use (configurable in `data/dash.sni/function/config.mcfunction`).

When a player dies with an Echoed item in their inventory, that item remains with them after death.

![Soul Echo Upgrade on Diamond Axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d29152b8f9ccb6657bf68037d1b5f9edd35cfb56.png)

![Soul Echo Upgrade Smithing Template Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d99b283f56c255530e9a7b9f5bb8dd14028ac1d0.png)

</details>



### Equipment

<details>
<summary>Amethyst Pick</summary>

A throwable block-mining tool.  
When thrown, it travels a long distance and mines the block that it hits.

If you break a block near you with it, it brings the dropped item to you.  
The item is single use.

![Recipe Amethyst Pick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b72f6d395b4f91e99d84df6b0d77f266f9be6d1d_0.webp)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Shulker Shield</summary>

An alternative version of the standard shield.  
It blocks all projectiles like a normal shield, but instead of reducing incoming damage, it grants the user 20 armor points and 8 armor toughness while in use.

The Shulker Shield is unbreakable.  
When used while looking downward and landing, it negates all fall damage and causes nearby entities to experience a brief levitation effect.

![Shulker Shield Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7075775eb0ecf82e6a634ed77b687dd93212a739.png)

</details>
